lines.speaker: Cavey Davey
lines.text: Be ye mad? There be Horrors in this cave!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Cavey Davey
lines.text: Have ye ever heard of the sort of evil, flesh-eatin' horrors that dwell in the darkest pits of the world?

lines.speaker: Cavey Davey
lines.text: The sort of dark, sanity-breakin' THINGS that cause the livin' to drop to their knees and weep for the fate of all creation?

lines.speaker: Cavey Davey
lines.text: Well, have ye?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I think I've killed a few of them as well.

lines.speaker: Cavey Davey
lines.text: Well, that's ok then.

lines.speaker: Cavey Davey
lines.text: But, ye'll need a Witchwood Icon from a slayer master if ye want te go in these caves and live.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Cavey Davey
lines.text: Well, ye see them Jungle Horrors? Well down in the caves there be Cave Horrors.

lines.speaker: Cavey Davey
lines.text: They are bigger, badder, meaner, and have a howl that freezes the blood in yer veins.

lines.speaker: Cavey Davey
lines.text: Wearin' earmuffs or a helmet won't work, cos them masks they wear make the sound magical. Only thing that works is wearin' a Witchwood Icon.

lines.speaker: Cavey Davey
lines.text: That is, o'course, if ye can see them, cos if ye don't have any light down there then yer likely te be picked te bones by the insects before the Horrors get ye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see, thanks for the warning.

lines.speaker: Cavey Davey
lines.text: Yer welcome.

lines.speaker: Cavey Davey
lines.text: Be ye some form of simpleton? Do ye not hear the howlin' of the Horrors?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I can hear something now you mention it...

lines.speaker: Cavey Davey
lines.text: That be them, howlin', always howlin'!

lines.speaker: Cavey Davey
lines.text: If ye value yer limbs ye'll put that Icon round yer neck, and hope they don't come out into the light!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err, all right, I'll get right on that.

lines.speaker: Cavey Davey
lines.text: Be ye here te deal with the Horrors?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I might well give it a shot.

lines.speaker: Cavey Davey
lines.text: Aye, well, keep yer Icon with ye if ye wants te walk out alive again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I will.
